title: Test a GFCI Outlet
description: Verify a ground-fault circuit interrupter outlet with a plug-in tester.

dialogue.text: GFCI outlets guard against shocks. Make sure your hands are dry and the wall plate is intact before we start.

Insert the GFCI tester fully into the outlet. Check the light pattern against the chart. Press the test button; the outlet should trip. Use the reset button to restore power and confirm the lights return to normal.
Nice work! The GFCI is wired correctly and trips as expected. Test it monthly and replace damaged outlets.
